commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a43b246a0204720db542d3b56ce73d6452162ebc)
commands.review_summary:
This PR makes direct block reply delivery non-blocking until later progress/tool events and schedules source reply transcript mirroring asynchronously after successful `message.action` sends.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is included. Source inspection shows current main awaits dispatcher idle after block replies and awaits `message.action` transcript mirroring before responding, while the PR tests simulate the intended latency/order path.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor/maintainer rebase plus real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not queue repair while the external proof gate is missing.

target.title: [codex] avoid blocking reply sends on bookkeeping
target.body:
## Summary
- stop awaiting direct block reply delivery on every block callback; instead flush pending block delivery before subsequent tool/progress events
- keep ACP direct block replies non-blocking while preserving block-before-tool delivery ordering
- schedule source reply transcript mirroring after successful `message.action` sends without blocking the gateway response
- serialize async source transcript mirrors per session so same-session transcript chronology is preserved

## Root Cause
Recent reply changes made lightweight replies wait on delivery bookkeeping in the hot path: block callbacks waited for dispatcher idle, and `message.action` waited for transcript mirroring after platform delivery. Under concurrent embedded runs/cron work this added reply latency and amplified gateway event-loop starvation.

## Impact
Simple visible replies can return sooner while user-visible send order and the existing block-before-tool/progress ordering guarantee are preserved. Transcript mirroring remains best-effort and still runs after successful source-conversation sends, with per-session ordering to avoid mirrored transcript reordering.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp-delivery.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/send.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/send.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
